---
agent: idea
description: Generate and prioritize website enhancement ideas and produce roadmap-ready TODO entries.
---

Review current site context and roadmap, then:
1. Propose 3-7 enhancement ideas.
2. Prioritize them by Impact × Effort × Readiness.
3. Produce roadmap-ready TODO entries for `design/website-roadmap.md` using:
   - Title
   - Why now
   - Scope (in/out)
   - Priority (P1/P2/P3)
   - Effort (S/M/L)
   - Acceptance signals
   - Status (Proposed/Planned/In Progress/Done)
4. Recommend which item should be handed off to planning next.
